CFP-028.description: Footer Omitted or Missing Loop_W Field

fixes.description: T-177: PostToolUse hook extracted to scripts/posttool_track.py — estimates tool-I/O chars (json input+response) and accumulates SESSION_TOTAL+CHAT_TOTAL atomically per tool call (previously LOOP_WEIGHT only). CLAUDE.md R1 L29/L31 reworded: removed the NEVER-estimated + agent-persist-every-turn contradiction -> hook-estimated lower bound = source of truth, agent reads only. settings.json PostToolUse now calls the script. 3 standalone tests pass (normal/empty/malformed fail-safe). Verified live: SESSION 0->201, CHAT 14335->14636 across tool calls.
fixes.note: estimate is a LOWER BOUND (hook cannot see model output tokens) — labelled approximate in footer

fixes.description: T-178: posttool_track.py made provider-aware — reuses token_estimator.PROVIDER_MULTS + _load_provider_formula (reads detected.md token_formula); session_delta = chars × provider tool-mult (anthropic 0.3 / openai 0.27 / google / generic). Dropped ad-hoc CHAT ×1.5 (chat_delta = session_delta). Import wrapped try/except → generic 0.35 fallback, fail-safe preserved. Tested temp: anthropic +138 / openai +124 / file-absent + malformed → no crash, unchanged.
